grantLeverageRange.rationale: A strong simulation package can support a proof-of-concept grant ask; award probability is separate.

immediateSaleRange.rationale: No patent, no chip, no foundry signoff, and no hardware data keep cash-sale value low.

partnerPackageRange.rationale: Value is in reviewer time saved by reproducible artifacts, not in build readiness.

summary.highestPriorityBlocker: No foundry-calibrated S-parameter compact models are attached to core devices.
